reason: Impacts Undici WebSocket client parsing. Nimbus production code runs on Cloudflare Workers and does not use Undici WebSocket client paths.
Impacts Undici WebSocket permessage-deflate handling. Nimbus does not open outbound WebSocket client connections in Cloudflare Workers runtime.
Impacts Undici WebSocket decompression negotiation in Node.js clients. This code path is not reachable in Cloudflare Workers fetch runtime used in production.
